questions.question: Does this facility have permit-required confined spaces (PRCS)?
questions.audit_impact: All Confined Space items (CS-1 through CS-24) apply

questions.question: Does this facility have powered industrial trucks (forklifts, pallet jacks)?
questions.audit_impact: All Forklifts & Materials items (PIT-1 through PIT-11) apply

questions.question: Does this facility have overhead cranes, gantry cranes, or hoists?
questions.audit_impact: All Cranes, Hoists & Rigging items (CR-1 through CR-10) apply

questions.question: Does this facility have welding, cutting, or brazing operations?
questions.audit_impact: All Welding & Hot Work items (WC-1 through WC-10) apply

questions.question: Do any employees have occupational exposure to blood or OPIM (first aid)?
questions.audit_impact: Bloodborne Pathogens items BP-1 through BP-7 apply

questions.question: Does this facility have automatic sprinkler systems?
questions.audit_impact: Fire Protection items FP-5 through FP-8 (sprinklers) apply

questions.question: Does this facility have standpipe and hose systems?
questions.audit_impact: Fire Protection item FP-16 (standpipe systems) applies

questions.question: Does this facility use LP gas / propane?
questions.audit_impact: Hazardous Materials items HM-9 through HM-11 (LP gas) apply

questions.question: Does this facility have abrasive blasting operations?
questions.audit_impact: Occupational Health item OH-1 (abrasive blasting ventilation) applies

questions.question: Does this facility have spray finishing / painting operations?
questions.audit_impact: Occupational Health item OH-3 (spray finishing ventilation) applies

questions.question: Does this facility have mechanical power presses?
questions.audit_impact: Machine Guarding items MG-11 and MG-12 (power presses) apply

questions.question: Do employees work in areas with noise levels at or above 85 dBA?
questions.audit_impact: Occupational Health items OH-4 through OH-10 (hearing conservation) apply

questions.question: Does this facility store or use compressed gas cylinders?
questions.audit_impact: Hazardous Materials items HM-1 through HM-4 (compressed gas) apply

questions.question: Does this facility store or use flammable or combustible liquids?
questions.audit_impact: Hazardous Materials items HM-5 through HM-8 (flammable liquids) apply

questions.question: Does this facility generate or process combustible dust?
questions.audit_impact: Hazard Communication item HC-10 (combustible dust) applies
